name: Blueberry Delight Pie
recipeIngredient: -Filling - Cream Cheese: 8 ounces fat-free cream cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare a pie pan by spraying with cooking spray and setting aside.
3. To prepare the crust, combine graham cracker crumbs, melted margarine, and sifted powdered sugar in a bowl.
4. Press mixture into prepared pie pan.
5. Meanwhile, whisk together cream cheese, whipped egg white, granulated sugar, and vanilla extract until smooth.
6. Spread filling over the crust.
7. Bake for 15 minutes or until set.
8. Cool completely.
9. Spread blueberry pie filling evenly over the cooled pie.
10. Spread topping evenly over the blueberry filling.
11. Chill before serving.
